headline: Assessing First Solar (FSLR) Valuation After A Powerful Multi Period Share Price Surge
summary: Recent performance snapshot First Solar (FSLR) has attracted fresh attention after a strong share price move, with the stock showing gains over the past week, month and past 3 months that stand well above 50% in several cases. See our latest analysis for First Solar. That move sits on top of a broader upswing, with a 30-day share price return of 60.95% and a 1-year total shareholder return of 94.07%. This suggests momentum has been building rather than fading around the US$306.79 stock. If...
